added: options.graphicsApi.restart: You must restart your game to change the graphics API.
options.graphicsApi.tooltip: Which graphics API to use for rendering. Leave as Default unless you have a specific need to change this! Will take affect the next time you start the game.
test.error.value_not_in_between: Expected %s to be in between %s and %s: was %s
removed: advancements.adventure.build_house.description: Watch 23 blocks and a door combine into a tiny house
advancements.adventure.build_trap.description: Watch out for 8 iron (or copper) bars, they're dangerous in groups. When you least expect it!
advancements.adventure.craft_chest.description: Craft a Chest to keep track of your blocks
advancements.adventure.crafter.description: Automate your crafting with a Crafter
advancements.adventure.end_portal.description: Watch twelve End Portal Frames with Eyes of Ender inserted combine into an End Portal
advancements.adventure.eye_frame_combination.description: Move an Eye of Ender close enough to an End Portal Frame for them to combine
advancements.adventure.furnace.description: Make a furnace that can smelt things for you
advancements.adventure.iron_ingot.description: Make your way to the iron age
advancements.adventure.mine_a_block.description: Punch a block until it comes alive
advancements.adventure.nether_portal.description: Watch twelve Obsidian and a Flint and Steel combine into a Nether Portal
advancements.adventure.wooden_pickaxe.description: Craft a tool that can mine for you
advancements.end.barrel_roll.description: Roll a barrel to the ends of the universe
advancements.end.barrel_roll.title: Never Give Up! Trust Your Instincts!
advancements.nether.barrel_roll.title: Do a Barrel Roll! Do it! Do it! Do it in the Nether!

values.previous:
Errors in currently selected data packs prevented the world from loading.

You can either try to load it with only the vanilla data pack ("safe mode"), or go back to the title screen and fix it manually.
values.current:
Errors in the currently selected data pack(s) prevented the world from loading.

You can either try to load it with only the vanilla data pack ("Safe Mode"), or go back to the title screen and fix it manually.

values.previous: When flowing lava is surrounded on two sides by lava sources it converts into a source.
values.current: When flowing lava is surrounded on two sides by lava sources it, converts into a source.

values.previous: Player's Nether portal delay in creative mode
values.current: Player's Nether Portal delay in creative mode

values.previous: Time (in ticks) that a creative mode player needs to stand in a Nether portal before changing dimensions.
values.current: Time (in ticks) that a creative mode player needs to stand in a Nether Portal before changing dimensions.

values.current: Player's Nether Portal delay in non-creative mode

values.previous: Time (in ticks) that a non-creative mode player needs to stand in a Nether portal before changing dimensions.
values.current: Time (in ticks) that a non-creative mode player needs to stand in a Nether Portal before changing dimensions.

values.previous: When flowing water is surrounded on two sides by water sources it converts into a source.
values.current: When flowing water is surrounded on two sides by water sources, it converts into a source.

values.previous: If you leave this Realm you won't see it unless you are invited again
values.current: If you leave this Realm, you won't see it unless you are invited again

values.previous: The world will be downloaded and added to your single player worlds.
values.current: The world will be downloaded and added to your singleplayer worlds.

values.previous: Realms is a safe, simple way to enjoy an online Minecraft world with up to ten friends at a time. It supports loads of minigames and plenty of custom worlds! Only the owner of the realm needs to pay.
values.current: Realms is a safe, simple way to enjoy an online Minecraft world with up to ten friends at a time. It supports loads of minigames and plenty of custom worlds! Only the owner of the Realm needs to pay.

values.previous:
Servers may list online players as part of their public status.

With this option off your name will not show up in such lists.
values.current:
Servers may list online players as part of their public status.

With this option off, your name will not show up in such lists.

values.previous: Uses HRTF-based directional audio to improve the simulation of 3D sound. Requires HRTF compatible audio hardware, and is best experienced with headphones.
values.current: Uses HRTF-based directional audio to improve the simulation of 3D sound. Requires HRTF-compatible audio hardware, and is best experienced with headphones.

values.previous:
Strength of nausea and Nether portal screen distortion effects.

At lower values, the nausea effect is replaced with a green overlay.
values.current:
Strength of Nausea and Nether Portal screen distortion effects.

At lower values, the Nausea effect is replaced with a green overlay.

values.previous: A hardware based filtering method, but impacts performance and significantly impacts video memory usage. May not be supported on all hardware.
values.current: A hardware-based filtering method, but impacts performance and significantly impacts video memory usage. May not be supported on all hardware.

values.previous:
(Rotated Grid Super Sampling)

A shader based filtering method that improves texture quality with a moderate performance impact.
values.current:
(Rotated Grid Super Sampling)

A shader-based filtering method that improves texture quality with a moderate performance impact.
